title: OpenAI Releases New ChatGPT Model After Government Review
subtitle: The company's latest AI, GPT-5.6, is now available to the public following security checks by the US government.

summary.en: OpenAI has officially released its newest AI model, ChatGPT 5.6, to the public. The launch follows a period of restricted access while the US government reviewed the technology for cybersecurity risks. Alongside the new model, OpenAI introduced a tool called ChatGPT Work to help users manage daily tasks. The company hopes this release will help it stay ahead of competitors in the global AI market. This development marks a significant step in the ongoing race to create more powerful and useful artificial intelligence.
summary.zh: OpenAI 已正式向大眾發布其最新的人工智慧模型 ChatGPT 5.6。此次發布是在美國政府針對網路安全風險審查該技術期間，經歷了一段限制存取後才進行的。除了新模型外，OpenAI 還推出了名為 ChatGPT Work 的工具，協助使用者管理日常任務。該公司希望此次發布能協助其在全球人工智慧市場中保持領先競爭對手的地位。此項發展標誌著在創造更強大、更實用的人工智慧競賽中，邁出了重要的一步。

paragraphs.en: OpenAI has officially released its latest artificial intelligence model, ChatGPT 5.6, to the public. This launch comes after a delay caused by the US government, which had raised concerns about potential cybersecurity risks. For the past month, the company limited access to the model, allowing only a small group of government-approved organizations to test it. According to The Verge, the government has now given the green light for a wider release.
paragraphs.zh: OpenAI 已正式向大眾發布其最新的人工智慧模型 ChatGPT 5.6。此次發布是在美國政府因擔憂潛在的網路安全風險而導致延宕後才進行的。在過去一個月中，該公司限制了對此模型的存取權限，僅允許一小群經政府核准的組織進行測試。根據科技新聞網站 The Verge 報導，政府現已批准更廣泛的發布。

paragraphs.en: This new model is a major update for the company. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman described it as the best model they have ever produced. The release includes a powerful product called Sol, which is designed to be highly efficient in areas like coding, science, and cybersecurity. As reported by The Guardian, OpenAI worked closely with the government’s Center for AI Standards and Innovation to ensure the technology was safe before making it available to everyone.
paragraphs.zh: 這款新模型是該公司的一次重大更新。OpenAI 執行長奧特曼 (Sam Altman) 將其形容為他們有史以來開發出最優秀的模型。此次發布包含了一項名為 Sol 的強大產品，旨在於程式編寫、科學研究及網路安全等領域展現高度效率。據《衛報》(The Guardian) 報導，OpenAI 與政府的「人工智慧標準與創新中心」密切合作，以確保該技術在開放給所有人使用前是安全的。

paragraphs.en: Alongside the new model, OpenAI also introduced a tool called ChatGPT Work. This new AI agent is designed to help everyday users with their work. It can connect to common computer programs like email, calendars, and document software to help people finish tasks faster. The Verge noted that this tool is a direct competitor to similar products from other companies, such as Anthropic’s Claude Cowork. OpenAI hopes that by combining its technology with these everyday apps, it can make AI more useful for the average person.
paragraphs.zh: 除了新模型外，OpenAI 還推出了一款名為 ChatGPT Work 的工具。這款新型人工智慧代理旨在協助一般使用者處理工作。它能連結電子郵件、行事曆及文件軟體等常見電腦程式，協助人們更快速地完成任務。The Verge 指出，這項工具是其他公司類似產品（例如 Anthropic 公司的 Claude Cowork）的直接競爭對手。OpenAI 希望透過將其技術與這些日常應用程式結合，能讓人工智慧對一般大眾更具實用性。

paragraphs.en: The path to this public release was not simple. The Trump administration had previously asked OpenAI to limit the release of its models to ensure they did not pose a threat to national security. This led to a period of tension, as the government also placed similar restrictions on other AI firms like Anthropic. According to The Guardian, the US government has been trying to balance the need for rapid technological progress with the fear that advanced AI could be used to launch dangerous cyber-attacks. While the administration has encouraged companies to move quickly to stay ahead in the global AI race, it has also introduced a new review process for companies to submit their latest models for evaluation.
paragraphs.zh: 通往此次公開發布的道路並不平坦。川普 (Donald Trump) 政府先前曾要求 OpenAI 限制其模型的發布，以確保它們不會對國家安全構成威脅。這導致了一段緊張時期，因為政府也對 Anthropic 等其他人工智慧公司實施了類似的限制。據《衛報》報導，美國政府一直試圖在快速技術進步的需求，與對先進人工智慧可能被用於發動危險網路攻擊的擔憂之間取得平衡。雖然政府鼓勵企業加速發展以在全球人工智慧競賽中保持領先，但也引入了一套新的審查流程，要求企業提交其最新模型以供評估。

paragraphs.en: These government restrictions have caused frustration in the tech industry. Many businesses rely on these advanced models to operate, and some international allies felt ignored when the US initially limited access to these tools to domestic entities only. Despite these challenges, the competition between major AI companies remains intense. Both OpenAI and Anthropic are working hard to lead the market as they prepare for potential public stock offerings later this year. The Guardian reported that OpenAI is aiming for a very high company value, though market uncertainty could affect these plans.
paragraphs.zh: 這些政府限制措施在科技產業中引發了挫折感。許多企業依賴這些先進模型來營運，且當美國最初將這些工具的存取權限僅限於國內實體時，一些國際盟友感到被忽視。儘管面臨這些挑戰，大型人工智慧公司之間的競爭依然激烈。OpenAI 與 Anthropic 皆在為今年稍晚可能進行的公開股票發行做準備，並努力爭取市場領導地位。《衛報》報導稱，OpenAI 目標追求極高的公司估值，儘管市場的不確定性可能會影響這些計畫。

paragraphs.en: For now, the focus is on the rollout of ChatGPT 5.6. The company stated that the new model is becoming available globally through its desktop app. While some users, such as those with professional or educational accounts, will get access first, the company expects the model to be available to all users within a short time. OpenAI is also marketing this model as a lower-cost option compared to competitors, which may be an important factor for customers who are currently facing rising costs in the AI industry.
paragraphs.zh: 目前，焦點在於 ChatGPT 5.6 的推廣。該公司表示，新模型正透過其桌面應用程式在全球範圍內陸續開放。雖然部分使用者（例如專業或教育帳戶持有者）將優先獲得存取權，但公司預計該模型將在短時間內開放給所有使用者。OpenAI 也將此模型行銷為比競爭對手更低成本的選擇，對於目前正面臨人工智慧產業成本上漲的客戶而言，這可能是一個重要的考量因素。

paragraphs.en: As the technology becomes more widely available, the debate over how to regulate AI will likely continue. The Trump administration’s recent actions show that the government is becoming more involved in how these powerful tools are developed and shared. For OpenAI, the successful release of ChatGPT 5.6 is a critical step in proving that its technology can be both powerful and safe. Whether this new model will set a new standard for intelligence and efficiency, as the company claims, remains to be seen as users begin to test its capabilities in their daily work.
paragraphs.zh: 隨著這項技術變得更加普及，關於如何監管人工智慧的辯論可能會持續下去。川普政府近期的行動顯示，政府正越來越深入參與這些強大工具的開發與共享方式。對 OpenAI 而言，成功發布 ChatGPT 5.6 是證明其技術既強大又安全的重要一步。正如該公司所宣稱的，這款新模型是否會為智慧與效率樹立新標準，仍有待使用者在日常工作中開始測試其功能後才能見分曉。

keyTerms.definitionEn: Permission to proceed with a project or activity.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 許可、開綠燈（准許某事進行）。
keyTerms.noteZh: 字面意思是綠燈，這裡引申為獲得批准。文中：According to The Verge, the government has now given the green light for a wider release.

keyTerms.definitionEn: The official introduction or launch of a new product or service.
keyTerms.definitionZh: （新產品或服務的）正式推出、發布。
keyTerms.noteZh: 由動詞片語 roll out 演變而來的名詞，常指大規模的產品發布。文中：For now, the focus is on the rollout of ChatGPT 5.6.

keyTerms.definitionEn: It is not yet certain or known; something that will be clear only in the future.
keyTerms.noteZh: 這是一個常用的固定片語，表示結果尚未揭曉。文中：Whether this new model will set a new standard for intelligence and efficiency, as the company claims, remains to be seen as users begin to test its capabilities in their daily work.

sources.name: The Guardian Technology
sources.title: OpenAI releases latest ChatGPT model after delay over White House cybersecurity concerns

sources.name: The Verge
sources.title: OpenAI rolls out GPT-5.6 after government greenlight — and announces ‘ChatGPT Work’

previousArticles.title: OpenAI Releases New AI Model Amid Government Security Concerns
previousArticles.summaryEn: OpenAI has officially released its newest AI model, ChatGPT 5.6, following a delay caused by US government security concerns. The Trump administration previously requested that the company limit access to the tool to ensure it was safe. This decision follows similar restrictions placed on other AI firms like Anthropic. The US government is currently trying to balance the need for rapid technological progress with the risks of cyber-attacks. Both OpenAI and Anthropic are preparing for major financial milestones as they compete for leadership in the AI industry.

quiz.question: What was the primary reason for the delay in the public release of ChatGPT 5.6?

options.A: OpenAI needed more time to finalize the coding capabilities of the Sol tool.
options.B: The US government expressed concerns regarding potential cybersecurity risks.
options.C: The company was waiting for a better time to launch to avoid market uncertainty.
options.D: OpenAI wanted to prioritize users with professional and educational accounts first.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第一段，ChatGPT 5.6 的發布延遲是因為美國政府對其潛在的網路安全風險（cybersecurity risks）表示擔憂。選項 A 提到的 Sol 工具是產品的一部分，而非延遲原因；選項 C 的市場不確定性在第五段提到，但與發布延遲無直接因果關係；選項 D 則是發布後的策略，而非延遲原因。

quiz.question: What can be inferred about the relationship between the US government and AI companies like OpenAI?

options.A: The government wants to stop the development of AI to prevent global competition.
options.B: The government is entirely opposed to the use of AI in daily work environments.
options.C: The government is attempting to balance the promotion of AI innovation with national security oversight.
options.D: The government has successfully eliminated all risks associated with AI technology.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。根據文章第四段，美國政府一方面鼓勵企業快速發展以在 AI 競賽中保持領先，另一方面又實施審查流程以防範網路攻擊，這顯示政府正試圖在科技進步與國家安全之間取得平衡。選項 A 錯誤，因為政府鼓勵企業領先；選項 B 錯誤，政府僅是加強監管而非禁止；選項 D 過於絕對，政府並未聲稱已消除所有風險。

quiz.question: In the first paragraph, what is the meaning of the phrase 'given the green light'?

options.D: Changed the color scheme of the software.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 A。在文中「given the green light」是一個慣用語，意指「給予綠燈」或「放行」，即批准某事進行。根據上下文，政府先前限制了模型的使用，現在則是批准了更廣泛的發布。選項 B、C、D 皆為字面解讀或錯誤聯想，與該片語在商業或行政情境下的實際含義不符。

quiz.question: What is the central message of the article regarding ChatGPT 5.6?

options.A: OpenAI is struggling to compete with Anthropic's new software products.
options.B: The US government has decided to ban all AI tools to protect national security.
options.C: ChatGPT 5.6 is the most expensive AI model ever created by OpenAI.
options.D: OpenAI has successfully navigated government regulations to launch a new model aimed at both safety and efficiency.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 D。文章整體討論了 ChatGPT 5.6 的發布過程，涵蓋了政府的監管挑戰、新功能的介紹（如 Sol 與 ChatGPT Work），以及公司如何在安全與創新之間取得平衡。選項 A 雖提及競爭，但非文章主旨；選項 B 與事實不符；選項 C 錯誤，文章最後一段提到該模型反而是「較低成本」的選擇。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
